channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lindsey Vonn Slams 'Haters' Who Called Her 'Selfish' for Taking an Olympics Spot with Torn ACL
item.description: Vonn, 41, dominated her World Cup season prior to the 2026 Winter Olympics, where she crashed 13 seconds into her downhill run

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Shares Candid Family Throwback Photos of Eric Dane and Their 2 Daughters After His Death
item.description: Gayheart and Dane separated in 2018, though she remained his primary caretaker throughout his ALS journey

item.title: Woman, 29, Chooses to Finally Embrace 'Silver' Hair After Going Gray at Age 13 (Exclusive)
item.description: “This is what I was always meant to look like,” Haley Zirbel tells PEOPLE

item.title: Bill Mazeroski, MLB World Series Champion Known for ‘One of the Greatest Home Runs in Baseball History,’ Dies at 89
item.description: The Pittsburgh Pirates legend, whose famous home run clinched the 1960 World Series for his team, died on Feb. 20

item.title: Tracy Morgan ‘Cried’ Watching “Dark Side of Comedy ”Doc Episode About His Toughest Moments (Exclusive)
item.description: Morgan was the subject of a 2023 episode of Vice's documentary series, which chronicled the 10-day coma he was in after a deadly car crash in 2014

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell's Brother Defends Former Prince Andrew After Arrest
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell's brother is publicly backing former Prince Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor ... claiming his actions may have been "sleazy" -- but, prose...

item.title: Furry Hat Hotties Bring the Heat in Sexy Snaps
item.description: Ski season will be over before you know it ... but, before it goes, we've got a series of fur hat hotties for you to enjoy! Sexy stars might be stripp...

item.title: James Van Der Beek’s Wife Reacts to Eric Dane’s Death
item.description: James Van Der Beek's wife Kimberly is reacting to the devastating loss of actor Eric Dane ... posting a group photo of her and James alongside Eric an...

item.title: Millie Bobby Brown Celebrated 22nd Birthday, David Harbour Attends
item.description: Millie Bobby Brown brought out some close friends and family together for an intimate birthday party ... and, if those David Harbour rift rumors weren...

item.title: Mexican Search Group Volunteers Say Pima County Won't Let Them Look For Nancy Guthrie
item.description: The Madres Buscadoras de Sonora -- the Mexican activist group that wants to help find Nancy Guthrie -- won't be allowed to search for her, they say .....
